title: Form 424B5 Northern Oil and Gas Inc For: 11 March
Trump will decide whether U.S. participates in IEA release of oil reserves, Interior Secretary says
summary: The IEA is group of 32 advanced economies primarily in Europe, North America and northeast Asia. The U.S. is a member of the organization.

title: Social Security 2027 cost-of-living adjustment forecast may rise with high oil prices
summary: The Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 may be 1.7% to 2.8%, according to new estimates. But that could increase if inflation climbs higher.

title: China Stockpiles Soften the Blow of the Global Oil Shock
summary: The world’s top crude oil and LNG importer, China, is not as exposed and vulnerable to energy deliveries from the Middle East as one might think. title: Shell and TotalEnergies Issue Force Majeure After Qatar LNG Shut Down
summary: Several major energy traders have begun declaring force majeure to their own customers after Qatar’s LNG shutdown rippled through global gas markets, according to Reuters sources on Wednesday.
